name: screeps_omega
description: Screeps World bot tooling and validation scripts.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run test
scripts.check:node24: npm run check:syntax:node24 && npm run test:node24
scripts.upload:alt: bash -lc 'export SCREEPS_SERVER_PROFILE=feat-node24 && source scripts/private_server/load_server_profile.sh && python3 scripts/private_server/upload_code.py src --server-url "$SCREEPS_SERVER_URL" --token "$SCREEPS_LOCAL_TOKEN"'
